title: Charged twice after cancelling subscription
body: I cancelled my subscription back in February but I was still charged $9.99 this month. Looking at my bank statement, it looks like I was actually charged twice in March? I'm not using the app anymore anyway so I definitely don't want to keep paying. Can you refund both charges and confirm the subscription is actually cancelled this time?

title: Nørrebro Hill Run segment not recorded
body: Hey, I just finished a track workout this morning and ran the Nørrebro Hill segment pretty hard—definitely would've been top 20 on the leaderboard. But when I checked my activity, there's no segment effort showing up. Did the segment get deleted or is there a sync issue with my watch? The activity uploaded fine otherwise.

title: Missing kudos from friend on activity
body: Hey, my friend told me they gave me kudos on my 'Errands' walk from Wednesday but I don't see it in my activity feed. Is there a lag or something? Also not sure if the kudos count is supposed to go up and down - saw it change earlier and got confused lol. Thanks!

title: GPS track cut through building, distance way off
body: Hey, my run from yesterday got totally messed up by the GPS. The track literally goes through a building on Nørrebrogade and cuts across the river instead of following the actual path I took. My actual distance was around 12km but it's only showing 10.2km, which is frustrating because I was proud of that run lol. Can you guys look into what happened? This kind of ruins the whole point of tracking these workouts properly.

title: Password reset email not arriving
body: Hi, I tried to reset my password but I never received the email. I've checked my spam folder too and nothing's there. I really want to get back into my account to log my walks. Can you help me resend it or reset it another way?

title: Request permanent account deletion with all data
body: Hey, I've decided to move on from the app and need my account completely deleted. I want all my activity data, personal info, and everything else wiped from your servers. I know I'm on the premium plan, so just let me know if there's a process for this or if I need to do anything specific. Thanks.

title: Password reset email never arrived
body: Hi, I'm trying to reset my password but I haven't received any email from you guys. I clicked the forgot password button like 10 mins ago and checked spam too. Can you help me get back into my account? I just started using the app and was logging my dog walks.

title: GPS track cuts through buildings on sunset ride
body: Just finished my sunset spin around the lake and the GPS went completely haywire. The track shows me riding straight through like 3 buildings near the Limmat, then somehow cuts 2km short of where I actually finished. My distance is showing 38km when it was definitely closer to 41. This is pretty frustrating when I'm trying to log my actual performance. Can you guys look into what happened with the satellite signal or whatever's causing this?

title: Password reset email never arrived
body: Hi, I've been trying to reset my password for the past hour but I'm not getting the email. I checked spam too and nothing's there. I've got a ride I want to log from this morning and I'm locked out. Can you either resend it or help me get back in another way? Thanks.

title: Power zones for cycling analysis please
body: Hey, I've been using the app for a while now and I'm really happy with the ride tracking overall. But I'd love to see power zone breakdowns during my rides—like knowing what percentage of time I spent in Z2 vs Z3 etc. I've got a power meter on my bike and I know the data's coming through, so it'd be huge for structured training if I could see that analysis in the app or on the website. Would this be something you could add?

title: Kudos from friend disappeared?
body: Hey, my mate said they gave me kudos on my climbing day activity from last week but I don't see it in the feed. Did it glitch or am I missing something obvious? Also noticed the kudos count seemed to jump around earlier but now it's lower than before. Cheers!

title: App keeps crashing when I open the feed
body: Hey, I've been trying to use the app on my iPhone 15 Pro this morning but it crashes every time I try to view my feed or click into any of my activities. I already restarted my phone and even deleted/reinstalled the app but it's still happening. This is pretty frustrating since I'm training for a triathlon and need to track my workouts. Can you help me figure out what's going on?

title: Elevation data way off on lunchtime loop
body: I did my usual 7km run around Bangalore today (March 3rd) and hit some decent hills - I know for a fact I climbed at least 600m based on the route. The app is showing only 47m of elevation. This isn't the first time this has happened and honestly it's a big reason I've stopped using the service. Did you guys ever fix the barometer calibration issue or is this still broken?

title: Refund request for April premium charge
body: Hey, I signed up for premium last month to track my rides during a training block, but I ended up not using the app nearly as much as I thought I would. I just got charged again and realized I completely forgot to cancel my subscription. Could you process a refund for the most recent charge? I appreciate it.

title: GPS track went straight through a building
body: Hey, I just finished my hill repeats workout yesterday and the GPS recorded me running directly through some apartment building near Parque Güell? Obviously I didn't actually run through a wall lol. My actual distance was around 8km but it's showing 9.5km because of this weird detour. Kind of kills the vibe when I'm trying to share my times with friends. Can you check what happened with the tracking?

body: Hey, I ran the Monsanto Park climb this morning (the one from Calvário up to the viewpoint) and my time would've been in the top 20 easily, but the activity didn't pick up the segment effort at all. The run is logged in my profile, GPS looks clean, so not sure what happened. Is there a known issue with that segment or something I need to enable?

I've already force-quit and reopened the app a few times. This was a solid run for me and I'm pretty frustrated it's just vanished. Can you help me track down where it went?

This is exactly the kind of thing that made me cancel—the segment tracking is unreliable and I can't trust the data. What's going on with the detection system?

My distance is showing 9.2km when I know I only did about 7.5km. Really frustrating because I was hoping to actually log this one properly. Can you help fix this?

One thing that's been bugging me though – I usually review and tag my activities in the evening, and the bright white interface is pretty harsh on the eyes in a dark room. Would it be possible to add a dark mode toggle? I know a lot of fitness apps have it these days and it'd make the post-ride routine way more comfortable. Thanks!

I do a lot of tempo work and it'd be amazing to see my efforts color-coded against zones I've actually calibrated for my running style. Would love to see this added!
